channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Trump says Iran war's core objectives near completion
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Takeaways from Trump’s address: No end date for Iran war and few details on strategy ahead
- Trump Initially Laid Out Five Goals for the Iran War. Here’s Where They Stand.
- Commentary: More bluster, some concessions but still no real plan for Iran war
- Trump says US military objectives in Iran ‘nearing completion’
- Trump’s surreal speech on Iran shed no light on his goals | Kenneth Roth
- Watch: Trump's shifting deadlines for ending Iran war
- How have Trump’s Iran war aims changed and has he achieved any of them?
- Explainer: What did Trump say in his national address on the Iran conflict?
- IN BRIEF: Kremlin statements on US gameplan in Iran
- Trump urges patience in Iran war address amid public skepticism
- The Biggest Takeaways From Trump’s Iran Address As He Signals Next Moves
- Trump uses Iran war address to urge an increasingly skeptical electorate to give him a bit more time
- Iran war: Trump says US will 'finish the job' in Iran
- First Thing: Trump claims Iran war is ‘nearing completion’ in address to nation
- What Trump’s speech says about his war on Iran | Analysis
- Trump says US forces will ‘finish the job’ soon in first prime-time speech since starting Iran war
- Trump says the Iran war may be ending soon: mission accomplished?
- Trump’s primetime speech on Iran war: Key takeaways

- Trump’s national address on Iran ’embarrassing, incoherent’

- Trump says Iran war ending soon, but ‘extremely hard’ hits ahead
- Trump says the Iran war may be ending soon: mission accomplished?
- Takeaways from Trump's speech on Iran
- 5 Takeaways From Trump’s Address on Iran

- Trump’s Iran war speech keeps markets away from what they were looking for: Analysts
- Trump frames Iran war as victory, says US objectives near completion
- Trump tells US that Iran war victory near, but vows big strikes
- Trump Promises Iran War Is ‘Nearing Completion’
- 4 Takeaways From Trump’s Primetime Address on Iran
- Trump laid out 5 goals for the Iran war on Feb 28. Here’s where they stand
- Takeaways from Trump’s speech on Iran
- Trump says US will 'finish the job' in Iran
- Trump says conflict nearing end, threatens wider attacks on Iran
- Iran war live: Trump claims goals nearing completion, vows to ‘finish job’

- Macron dismisses Trump's 'inelegant' dig about his marriage
- Macron fires back at Trump over marriage quip, NATO threats
- Trump marriage jibe does not merit response: Macron

- 'Macron still recovering from right to jaw': Trump ROASTS French Prez, says 'wife treats him badly'
- Anger in France over Trump’s Macron dig that wife treats him ‘badly’
- Trump takes a dig at Macron, saying France President’s wife treats him ‘badly’]]>
